title: Scan Surface Feature
description: Scans the surface of a Chunk, calling place() on the surface of each block column.

scan_surface_definition.title: Scan Surface Definition
scan_surface_definition.description: A single Scan Surface Feature Definition.

identifier.description: The identifier for this feature. The identifier must include a namespace and must match the filename.

scan_surface_feature.description: Reference to the feature to place on the scanned surface.
